name: ghidra-headless-service-local
description: Local headless Ghidra REST service (upload binary, list functions, decompile). For air-gapped, same-machine training labs.

endpoints.description: Upload a binary and start analysis. Returns job_id.
Decompiled pseudocode for function at address {addr}.
Callers and callees for function at {addr}.
Extracted printable strings from the binary.
Simple NL query over exported artifacts (training/demo).
OpenAI-style tool definitions for LLM calls.
